changes.summary: New BC-12 inv-09 RegisterPasskeyUseCase: authn enabled gate, registration identity validation, delegates generatePasskeyRegistrationOptions and verifyPasskeyRegistration to AuthProviderService (passkey_challenges persistence unchanged), establishes JWT session on finish when jwt present. Exports PasskeyAuthDisabledError, PasskeyRegistrationIdentityRequiredError, createRegisterPasskeyUseCase factory.

New BC-12 inv-09 AuthenticatePasskeyUseCase: login start/finish (generatePasskeyLoginOptions, verifyPasskeyLogin) and unified authenticate start/finish (generatePasskeyAuthenticationOptions, authenticateWithPasskey) delegate to AuthProviderService with establishJwtSession on finish. Exports createAuthenticatePasskeyUseCase factory; re-exports PasskeyAuthDisabledError.

notes: AuthController wiring to RegisterPasskeyUseCase and AuthenticatePasskeyUseCase is outside write_set (follow-up). Transport concerns (ForbiddenException mapping, raw res.json for @simplewebauthn/browser) remain in the controller.
